content:
{
  "market_assessment": {
    "bias": "CAUTIOUS",
    "reasoning": "Broad market weak with Nifty -1.29%, Bank Nifty -1.42%, India VIX +8.66% to 18.95 — risk-off tape. However, defensive pockets (Pharma, FMCG, select Energy upstream) showing relative strength. Crude spike + INR weakness creates differentiated winners (ONGC, COALINDIA) vs losers (banks, autos). Holdings book is +0.68% on day — focus this tick on locking in gains via SL trails, not chasing fresh breakouts in a high-VIX tape.",
    "key_levels": {
      "nifty_support": 23800,
      "nifty_resistance": 24020
    }
  },
  "decisions": [
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1015.00,
      "new_target": 1110.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Current SL 1030 is now 0.24% below CMP 1028.45 — i.e., SL is ABOVE LTP, an effective stop-out trap. Position has run from entry 984 → 1052 high → faded to 1028 (intraday rejection at R1 1058). Loosening from 1030 to 1015 is NOT permitted by the tighten-only rule, so I will instead leave the original SL where it is by keeping new_stop_loss at the original 1030... ACTUALLY this would be a no-op and engine rejects loosening. Correcting: emit HOLD via position_actions instead — see below. Replacing this decision with EXIT logic is wrong since thesis intact. Switching to HOLD."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 beat thesis intact (PAT +19%, GNPA <1%, AUM ₹90k cr). However SL at 1030 is now effectively at LTP 1028 — likely to trip on next downtick. Cannot loosen SL. Accept that this position may stop out at near-breakeven on routine intraday noise; if it does, that's the design. If it holds 1030 and bounces, target 1110 remains valid."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.6,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Down 2.3% on gold's pullback from Q1 record highs. Macro hedge thesis (INR record low, VIX 18.95, geopolitical tail) intact. CMP 122.35 vs SL 119 — SL ~2.7% below, room to breathe. Hold; no trim, no add. Pullback is mean-reversion, not thesis break."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 1762.00,
      "new_target": 1830.00,
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "No-op MODIFY would be wasted. Switching to HOLD — current SL 1762 is appropriate (1.0% below CMP 1780.80, locks in ~1.6% above entry 1734). Organon $11.75bn deal + sector tariff carve-out for generics is bullish. Q4 results May 21 is binary catalyst — will reassess closer. Target 1830 intact (52w high 1851)."
    },
    {
      "action": "MODIFY",
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "new_stop_loss": 478.00,
      "new_target": 500.00,
      "confidence": 0.75,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Skipping no-op. SL 478 is 1.5% below CMP 485.40, locks +1.9% above entry 469. Q4 PAT +11%, dividend ₹26.5/share FY26 paid, near 52w high (490+). Target 500 within reach — let it work. Switching to HOLD action below."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.55,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Q4 PAT +68% YoY beat but NII only +1.4% — beat largely provision-release driven. Stock made fresh 52w high 198.50 today after gap-up but faded to 196.60. Position -1.4% from entry 200. SL at 195 just 0.8% below CMP — tight by design given gap-up failure risk. Hold; if 195 breaks the gap-fill thesis is confirmed and exit is automatic via SL."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.7,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Made 52w high 307.45 at open, faded to 299.80 (-0.5%). Brent at $120+ wartime spike directly benefits upstream realization. SL 295 is 1.6% below CMP, locks small loss vs entry 302 — appropriate given crude reversion risk on any US-Iran de-escalation headline. Q4 results late-May. Target 322 intact. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "HOLD",
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.65,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "ETF +0.5%, providing diversified pharma exposure (Sun-Organon catalyst, sector resilience). SL 22.85 is 3.9% below CMP 23.79 — appropriate for ETF volatility. Target 24.95. Hold."
    },
    {
      "action": "NO_ACTION",
      "symbol": "GESHIP",
      "exchange": "NSE",
      "product": "CNC",
      "confidence": 0.5,
      "timeframe": "SWING",
      "reasoning": "Existing OPEN BUY LIMIT @ 1542 placed 388m ago is still working. Not stacking a second order. Letting it sit — if it fills, it fills; setup (shipping, Strait of Hormuz freight rate tailwind) intact."
    }
  ],
  "position_actions": [
    {
      "symbol": "PNBHOUSING",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1030 is currently above CMP 1028.45 — would be loosening to lower it, which guardrails reject. Accept the structural design; if SL trips on next downtick, exit at +4.7% locked. If 1030 holds, target 1110 is still in play."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "GOLDBEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Macro hedge thesis intact. SL 119 has appropriate breathing room (~2.7% below CMP). No action."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "SUNPHARMA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 1762 already locks gains above entry 1734. Q4 results May 21 — will reassess in 2-3 sessions. Let winner run toward 1830 target."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "COALINDIA",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "SL 478 locks +1.9% above entry. Near 52w high; let momentum run toward 500 target. Will trail tighter once 490 breaks."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "BANDHANBNK",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Gap-up failure risk acknowledged. SL 195 (0.8% below CMP) is intentionally tight — auto-stops out if today's gap fills."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "ONGC",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Crude wartime spike thesis. SL 295 appropriate vs reversion risk. Target 322."
    },
    {
      "symbol": "PHARMABEES",
      "current_action": "HOLD",
      "new_stop_loss": null,
      "reasoning": "Defensive ETF, breakeven+. SL 22.85 has room. Let it work alongside SUNPHARMA exposure."
    }
  ],
  "watchlist_notes": "BHARTIARTL — defensive telecom with tariff hike catalyst (Jul 2026) and Google Vizag AI hub partnership; if it pulls back to 1850 area, fresh swing entry candidate. Skipping today: at 1879 (near intraday VWAP), R:R poor with target 1950ish vs entry 1880. PIRAMALFIN — 12x volume surge interesting but Q4 PAT 390% is exceptional-gain inflated; sell-side avg target 1866 BELOW CMP 1980 — pass. SYNGENE +9.88% is a dead-cat bounce after -41.9% one-year drawdown and Q4 EBITDA -12% — avoid. RBLBANK +5% but NIM contracted 48bps YoY, slippage stress in 1HFY27 — pass. CANHLIFE thin profitability, recent IPO, pass. EMCURE at ATH after 61% YoY run + semaglutide margin compression + governance noise — pass.",
  "portfolio_notes": "Day 11. Cumulative +0.23%, but rolling 5-day shows 13% win rate and -₹3,991 net — strategy is bleeding from churn and stop-outs. Today's tick deliberately emits ZERO new entries: VIX +8.66%, Nifty -1.29%, banking down hard — this is not an accumulation tape. Existing book is well-positioned (3 of 7 positions in green, all SLs functional). Cash 63% deployable — keeping powder dry. Key risk: PNBHOUSING SL is effectively at LTP, may stop out today; that's acceptable as it locks ~+4.7%. GESHIP OPEN order at 1542 will likely not fill in a falling tape; if still pending tomorrow with deteriorating market, will cancel."
}
